## Session 297 Summary

**What was done:**
- Removed all stale ChromaDB references from 9 files across the codebase
- **Fixed broken `backup_database()`** — was silently skipping every session because it checked `chroma.sqlite3` mtime (never changes post-migration). Now checks `lancedb/` dir mtime. Confirmed working: 119.81 MB backup created.
- Replaced orchestrator watchdog (chroma size check → LanceDB dir existence)
- Deleted `build_from_chromadb` alias, updated docstrings/comments/tests
